text:
is a line of candy toys produced by Shokugan that was released on 18 January 2021. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2021/4549660503415000.html The line was based on the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. There are 5 regular figures in the line with around 65mm in height. https://www.eva-info.jp/12129
